info.name: FleetCheck Pro - Complete API (Secured)
info.description: Full secured API collection for FleetCheck Pro: CRUD, lookups, and the 4-zone inspection checklist with JWT Auth.

request.description: Returns a JWT. Copy it to the {{jwt_token}} collection variable.
Used to change the PIN for an existing user.
You can now include the 'pin' directly during creation.

body.raw:
